cards.front: Definition of Noise in Image Restoration
cards.back: Random fluctuations or variations in the image pixels, caused by various factors such as sensor noise, pixel quantization, or atmospheric conditions.

cards.front: Types of Noise in Image Restoration
cards.back: Gaussian Noise, Salt and Pepper Noise, Impulsive Noise, and Poisson Noise

cards.front: Methods for Removing Noise in Image Restoration
cards.back: Filtering, Thresholding, Wavelet Denoising, and Machine Learning-based Methods

cards.front: Effect of Noise on Image Restoration Techniques
cards.back: Noise can affect the performance of image restoration techniques, such as reducing the accuracy of the restored image and introducing artifacts.

cards.front: Common Noise Models in Image Restoration
cards.back: Gaussian Noise Model, Non-Gaussian Noise Model, and Compound Noise Model
